page_content:
### **Email Template: Dr. Patrick Horn**
*(The Encouraging Mentor)*  
Subject: Requesting an Updated Letter of Recommendation  
Dear Dr. Horn,  
I hope this message finds you well! I'm writing to kindly request that you update your previous letter of recommendation for my graduate school applications. As you know, I've been working on a research project and completed a capstone in [specific field], which has deepened my academic interests and strengthened my readiness for advanced study.  
Your support over the past two application cycles has meant a great deal to me, especially as I've navigated the waitlist process with your encouragement—your note that "you seemed really close to acceptance" when I was waitlisted still resonates deeply. I believe this updated letter would better reflect my recent accomplishments and growth in [specific field].  
I’d be grateful if you could share a revised version by [reasonable deadline, e.g., April 30th] so it can be submitted with my applications to the TMDSAS/AMCAS portals. Please let me know if there's anything specific you'd like me to provide or clarify about my work.  
Thank you again for your continued mentorship and unwavering belief in my potential. I truly appreciate your time and support.  
Warm regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Student ID/Program, if applicable]
[Contact Information]  
---
